'''Quas Killam''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] on the edge of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]. Its [[Species/Legends|people]] were the [[Killam]]. Quas Killam was a world of weapons manufacturing factories and [[trinium]] mines, and so was conquered by the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation]] early in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="SotJ" /> Throughout the war the planet changed sides several times.<ref name="TEA" />

{{Planet-stub}}
